items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the delivery confirmation requirement.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the delivery confirmation process, including the digital signature capture and photo documentation. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate these functionalities. As a result, it is not possible to confirm or deny whether the requirement is satisfied based on the current evidence.
